use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation, headers, or user menus
Show user avatars in comment sections, forums, or chat interfaces
Render entity avatars in lists, cards, or data tables
Provide fallback initials when images fail to load
Create consistent user representation across social or collaboration platforms
ai_summary: A clean, accessible Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with separate AvatarImage and AvatarFallback sub-components. Uses Tailwind for minimalist rounded styling with responsive sizing, suitable for displaying user profiles or entity images with graceful fallback to initials when images fail to load.
